title: Source Tells Me Charlie Is Stable, Please God
about: Source Tells Me Charlie Is Stable, Please God is a viral Twitter / X post by right-wing political commentator Tim Pool posted shortly after the shooting of Charlie Kirk in mid-September 2025, where he wrote, "Source tells me Charlie is stable. Please God." Kirk was pronounced dead not long after the post was made. The post text became a copypasta, phrasal template and the subject of memes over the following months, where the name "Charlie" is often replaced with another person or character to alter the context.
origin:
On September 10th, 2025, conservative political activist and podcaster Charlie Kirk was shot while speaking at Utah Valley University. Hours after he was shot, right-wing political commentator and content creator Tim Pool (@Timcast) posted on X,[1] "Source tells me Charlie is stable. Please god," garnering over 121,000 likes and 10,000 reposts in four months. He elaborates in a comment under the thread, writing, "I received a call from a trustworthy source who told me this. I want to believe and Im hoping. Just pray."

Charlie Kirk was pronounced dead later that day.
